commands.repair_reason: Protected maintainer labeling, broad SDK/prompt/channel scope, and current head check failures make this a human review and landing item rather than a ClawSweeper repair job.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain issue found; the diff changes TypeScript source/tests only, does not alter dependencies or CI, and the new prompt path avoids raw history media paths and URLs. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds shared `HistoryEntry`/`HistoryMediaEntry` types and inbound-history builders, migrates bundled channel adapters to them, and renders sanitized media metadata in inbound prompt history.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a refactor/API-surface PR rather than a bug report. I reviewed current-main source, the PR patch, live labels/comments/checks, maintainer notes, and history instead of establishing a failing reproduction path.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer labeling, broad SDK/prompt/channel scope, and current head check failures make this a human review and landing item rather than a ClawSweeper repair job.
